inputs.label: Student Score
inputs.businessContext: The raw score of the student (e.g., GPA, exam mark).

inputs.label: Total Students
inputs.businessContext: Total number of students in the comparison group.

inputs.label: Number of Students with Lower Scores
inputs.businessContext: Count of students who scored below the student.

label_i18n.en: Number of Students with Lower Scores
label_i18n.tr: Number of Students with Lower Scores
label_i18n.de: Number of Students with Lower Scores
label_i18n.fr: Number of Students with Lower Scores
label_i18n.es: Number of Students with Lower Scores
label_i18n.ar: Number of Students with Lower Scores

inputs.label: Number of Students with Same Score
inputs.businessContext: Count of students who scored exactly the same as the student.

label_i18n.en: Number of Students with Same Score
label_i18n.tr: Number of Students with Same Score
label_i18n.de: Number of Students with Same Score
label_i18n.fr: Number of Students with Same Score
label_i18n.es: Number of Students with Same Score
label_i18n.ar: Number of Students with Same Score

inputs.label: Minimum Possible Score
inputs.businessContext: The lowest possible score in the scale (e.g., 0).

inputs.label: Maximum Possible Score
inputs.businessContext: The highest possible score in the scale (e.g., 100).
